featured.title: bigfiles
featured.description: Find the big files, old files, and duplicates clogging your computer and reclaim gigabytes you forgot you had.

featured.title: [CURRENTLY BUILDING] S1NAPSE
featured.description: Built to see my own ACC laps, S1napse grew into a full sim + real-racing telemetry suite — self-building track maps, per-corner coaching, and an ELM327 bridge that brings the same tools to a real car.

featured.title: BLUEHACKS 2026
featured.description: Cities are living experiments, but sim.ula believes the lab shouldn't be the streets themselves. By winning 3rd place overall at BlueHacks 2026, this AI-driven tool is proving that advanced engineering can simulate the future of urban policy before a single peso is ever spent.
